chain.thought: Explanation: The table shows a three-year cycle: Year 1 (e.g., 2013, 2016, 2019, 2022) covers verses 6:2–7:7, Year 2 (e.g., 2014, 2017, 2020, 2023) covers 7:8–8:15, and Year 3 (e.g., 2015, 2018, 2021, 2024) covers 8:16–9:35. After completing Year 3, the readings return to Year 1, meaning the same verses are read again every three years.

judge_thought: Explanation: The table shows a three-year cycle with columns labeled Year 1, Year 2, and Year 3. Each year column lists specific years (e.g., Year 1: 2013, 2016, 2019, 2022), which repeat every three years. The verse ranges associated with each year column would be read again when that year type recurs, i.e., after three years.
